message:
Move skill (#14)

* Move tenzir-ship agent skill to skills/tenzir-ship

* Retire packages/pi-tenzir-ship and remove legacy skill paths

* Update README to install skill via npx skills add tenzir/ship

* Remove sunsetted pi package

files.patch:
@@ -1,47 +0,0 @@
-name: Pi Package
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - "packages/**"
-      - "skill/**"
-  pull_request:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - "packages/**"
-      - "skill/**"
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-
-jobs:
-  validate:
-    name: Validate pi package
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - name: Set up Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "20"
-
-      - name: Install uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
-
-      - name: Sync skill into package
-        working-directory: packages/pi-tenzir-ship
-        run: npm run sync:skill
-
-      - name: Install skills-ref
-        run: uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
-
-      - name: Validate skill
-        run: skills-ref validate packages/pi-tenzir-ship/skills/tenzir-ship
-
-      - name: Validate package contents
-        working-directory: packages/pi-tenzir-ship
-        run: npm pack --dry-run

@@ -1,42 +0,0 @@
-name: Publish Pi Package
-
-on:
-  release:
-    types: [published]
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-permissions:
-  id-token: write # Required for OIDC
-  contents: read
-
-jobs:
-  publish:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    defaults:
-      run:
-        working-directory: packages/pi-tenzir-ship
-
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "24"
-          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
-
-      - name: Publish to npm
-        run: |
-          set -euo pipefail
-          name="$(node -p "require('./package.json').name")"
-          version="$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
-
-          if npm publish; then
-            exit 0
-          fi
-
-          if npm view "${name}@${version}" version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-            echo "::notice::${name}@${version} is already published; skipping npm publish."
-            exit 0
-          fi
-
-          echo "::error::npm publish failed for ${name}@${version}, and that version is not available on npm."
-          exit 1

@@ -40,7 +40,6 @@
 - Build package:
   - `uv build`
 
-## Pi Skill Package
+## Skills
 
-When modifying the skill under `packages/pi-tenzir-ship/skills/`, bump the
-version in `packages/pi-tenzir-ship/package.json` accordingly.
+The agent skill lives under `skills/tenzir-ship/`.

@@ -27,6 +27,14 @@ uvx tenzir-ship --help
 `uvx` downloads the newest release, runs it in an isolated environment, and
 caches the result for snappy subsequent invocations.
 
+## 🤖 Agent Skill
+
+Install the skill via Vercel Skills:
+
+```sh
+npx skills add tenzir/ship
+```
+
 ## 📚 Documentation
 
 Consult our [user

@@ -1,23 +0,0 @@
-# pi-tenzir-ship
-
-Pi skill package for [tenzir-ship](https://github.com/tenzir/ship) changelog and
-release workflows.
-
-## Install
-
-```sh
-pi install npm:pi-tenzir-ship
-```
-
-## Use
-
-Inside pi:
-
-```text
-/skill:tenzir-ship
-```
-
-## Documentation
-
-- https://docs.tenzir.com/reference/ship-framework.md
-- https://docs.tenzir.com/guides/packages/maintain-a-changelog.md

@@ -1,36 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "name": "pi-tenzir-ship",
-  "version": "0.1.2",
-  "description": "Pi skill for tenzir-ship changelog and release workflows",
-  "license": "Apache-2.0",
-  "keywords": [
-    "pi-package",
-    "pi",
-    "skill",
-    "tenzir",
-    "tenzir-ship"
-  ],
-  "repository": {
-    "type": "git",
-    "url": "https://github.com/tenzir/ship",
-    "directory": "packages/pi-tenzir-ship"
-  },
-  "homepage": "https://github.com/tenzir/ship/tree/main/packages/pi-tenzir-ship",
-  "bugs": "https://github.com/tenzir/ship/issues",
-  "files": [
-    "skills/**",
-    "README.md"
-  ],
-  "pi": {
-    "skills": [
-      "./skills"
-    ]
-  },
-  "scripts": {
-    "sync:skill": "rm -rf skills && mkdir -p skills && cp -R ../../skill ./skills/tenzir-ship",
-    "prepack": "rm -rf skills && mkdir -p skills && cp -R ../../skill ./skills/tenzir-ship"
-  },
-  "engines": {
-    "node": ">=20"
-  }
-}
